summary: Tested all 22 v2 features: Anti-cheat workout validation and turn-based CombatModal. All scenarios passed. Pure localStorage app, no backend.
critical_code_review_comments: CombatModal.jsx: Player dodge check uses `playerHP` from closure instead of `newPHP` for defeat detection (line 84: `if (!playerEvades && newPHP <= 0)` checks newPHP correctly, but setPlayerHP is async so `playerHP` in closure may be stale for multi-hit scenarios). Currently works because defeat check uses `newPHP` not state. No immediate bug, but worth noting.
CombatModal.jsx: No data-testid on RETREAT button in intro phase and no data-testid on X close button. Minor testability gap.
WorkoutModal.jsx: Progress bar color changes to orange at 75% (180 min) and red at 100% (240 min) - works correctly.
test_credentials: No auth. Used localStorage injection: fitness_quest_v1 key.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage injection for game state: warrior class, STR=3/AGI=1/END=2 for most tests; STR=1/AGI=1/END=1 for defeat test. fq_daily_workout set to 200 min for daily limit test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2 features working: Anti-cheat (session limit 120min, daily limit 240min, progress bar, RPG errors), CombatModal (intro/combat/victory/defeat phases, all data-testid working). Use localStorage key 'fitness_quest_v1'. AGI>=2 badge shows text-red-400 when unmet (AGI=1), text-green-400 when met. Previous iteration bugs (LOG WORKOUT overlap, EXPLORE badge overlap) still present but workaround: use page.mouse.click(x, y+5) pattern to click top of buttons.
